sections.heading: Step 1: Modify an alert.
sections.body:
- Click the **Alert Settings** tab.

- Click ellipsis-h to the right of the alert you
  want to modify (edit, clone, disable, delete).

sections.heading: Why has Atlas stopped monitoring my cluster?
sections.body:
Atlas pauses monitoring for Free clusters which have
had no connection activity for 7 days. Monitoring resumes once a
successful connection occurs through the Atlas Administration API,
Driver,
[mongosh](mongodb-shell), or
Data Explorer.
